tasks.label: live
tasks.detail: air live-reload. Rebuilds on .go/.templ changes. Manual browser refresh (Cmd+R).

tasks.label: live (auto-reload browser)
tasks.detail: templ proxy + go run. Opens http://localhost:7331; browser auto-refreshes on rebuild. Slower than air (~2-3s per rebuild) but zero race conditions.
tasks.command: go tool templ generate -watch -proxy=http://localhost:$(grep ^PORT= .env | cut -d= -f2) -proxyport=7331 -cmd='go run ./cmd/api'

tasks.label: go: test all
tasks.command: docker build -t go-test-runner -f Dockerfile.test . && touch "${workspaceFolder}/domain.out" "${workspaceFolder}/all_output_domain.log" "${workspaceFolder}/controller.out" "${workspaceFolder}/all_output_controller.log" "${workspaceFolder}/repository.out" "${workspaceFolder}/all_output_repository.log" && docker run --rm -w /app -v "${workspaceFolder}/domain.out":/app/domain.out -v "${workspaceFolder}/all_output_domain.log":/app/all_output_domain.log -v "${workspaceFolder}/controller.out":/app/controller.out -v "${workspaceFolder}/all_output_controller.log":/app/all_output_controller.log -v "${workspaceFolder}/repository.out":/app/repository.out -v "${workspaceFolder}/all_output_repository.log":/app/all_output_repository.log go-test-runner
tasks.detail: Builds a Docker image and runs the test command defined within the Dockerfile for domain, controller, and repository. Outputs are mapped to the workspace after ensuring they exist as files.
